__meta__.description: gauntlet DA 커버리지 판정 규칙 SSOT. 이 파일을 변경할 경우 SKILL.md Degraded Mode 표 및 ai-role-assignment.md §7도 함께 동기화해야 한다.
sync_targets: SKILL.md (Step 0-D provider 검증, Degraded Mode 처리 섹션)
__meta__.changelog: v1.1: hil_state_machine + provider_registry + stage_downgrade_rule 추가 (C1/C2 fix)

insufficient_coverage.description: 이 임계값 이상 SKIPPED 시 INSUFFICIENT COVERAGE 처리. 자동 최종화 금지.

exit_code_to_skip_mapping.description: Stage 2 API exit code → SKIPPED 카운트 매핑. exit 2·3은 각각 SKIPPED +1.

matching.negation_rule: accepted 키워드가 있어도 negation_prefixes와 함께 사용되면 rejected로 처리
matching.description: HIL 수락 키워드 매칭 규칙. 부정 문맥에서 accepted 키워드를 오탐하지 않도록 한다.

verified_output_conditions.description: Verified Output requires Stage 2 with 0 SKIPs. A single SKIP downgrades to Partial Verified Output. INSUFFICIENT COVERAGE blocks label entirely.

hil_state_machine.description: SSOT for HIL state machine. 'finalized' can only be written in Step 10 after explicit user approval. Step 9 must only write 'result-generated'. Any code that sets status='finalized' outside of Step 10 is a violation of this rule.

provider_registry.description: Only registered providers are valid in config.providers[]. Unknown providers cause hard fail (exit 2) at Step 0-D. To add a new provider: (1) add providers/<name>.json + providers/<name>.sh, (2) add '<name>' to known_providers here, (3) add to config.json providers[].

stage_downgrade_rule.description: If Stage 2 is configured but all providers are SKIPPED before any successful dispatch, Stage 2 is downgraded to Stage 1. Verified Output label cannot be issued with 0 actual dispatched providers.

budget._note: Budget cap is stored in ~/.gauntlet/config.json but NOT enforced in real-time in v1.0. Monitor your API provider dashboard directly.

roadmap.planned_mechanism: pre-flight cost estimate via provider token-count API + per-session hard cap with early exit
roadmap.workaround: Monitor your API provider dashboard. Tier 1 Stage 2 makes up to 3 provider calls per session. Check usage before running in batch.
